samples.The Linux kernel is: The Linux kernel is not the core of the Linux kernel, but it's the same in Linux-style systems where a lot of applications are installed and installed (and so on) from the root. If you install any application that uses the kernel you'll have to boot it up from the root of the computer.

The Linux kernel is compiled with the "x86_64" architecture.  The binary has no internal extensions and support for all other extensions.
